---
name: "💡 Feature Request"
about: "Suggest an idea or improvement"
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. *(e.g. "I always have to...")*

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Which component does this affect?

`[ ] Firmware (SablinaTamagotchi_2.0)`  
`[ ] ESP-IDF variant (SablinaTamagotchi_2.0_idf)`  
`[ ] Simulator`  
`[ ] Documentation`  
`[ ] Other`

## Additional context

Any mockups, references, or extra context you'd like to add.
